snippets.text: The Company also has exclusive rights to sell and distribute the Indian River strain from Aviagen (United States) in Indonesia. The Company produces and markets Day-Old-Chicks (DOC) under the MB202 brand for broiler chicken.
Own exclusive right to sell and distribute the Indian River strains from Aviagen (United States).
We exclusively use the Indian River breeds, which are specially tailored for tropical climate conditions, particularly in relation to tolerance of heat, humidity and resistance to disease.

Corn and soybean meal (SBM) are the primary components of production for animal feed. Market prices for these commodities can fluctuate due to weather, harvest sizes, supply chain, trade war, storage costs, government policies, foreign exchange rates, and other factors.

We purchase our corn locally and dry it in our dedicated facilities before storing it in warehouses or silos. When it comes to imported SBM, our Commodity Sourcing Specialist actively monitors price fluctuations, allowing us to seize opportunities to buy at lower prices from international traders while also storing the product in our warehouses or silos.

Copra meal is one of the key raw materials used in feed production. Therefore, the Company operates a copra meal business to support its core operations. The Company also carries out extraction processes to produce crude coconut oil, refined, bleached and deodorised (RBD) coconut oil and copra meal extract that is sold domestically or exported to South Korea and Japan.

With the exclusive rights to sell and distribute the Indian River strains from Aviagen (United States) in Indonesia, we produces and markets Day Old Chick (DOC) with brand, namely the MB202 for broiler.
Aviagen® Asia Pacific and Japfa recently teamed up to bring the latest poultry innovations and expertise to Indian River® poultry producers across Indonesia.
Japfa and Aviagen have built a strong, long-term collaboration, working together to grow the Indian River brand across Asia and beyond.

Cargill and So Good Food, a wholly-owned Indonesian subsidiary of leading agri-food company Japfa, have entered into a 60-40 joint venture to produce and supply fully-cooked poultry products in Indonesia.
have entered into a 60-40 joint venture to produce and supply fully-cooked poultry products in Indonesia.
